title: Hospital malpractice suit over knee replacement reaches $12M settlement
snippet: A federal jury awarded $12M to a patient who suffered permanent nerve damage after a botched knee replacement surgery due to surgical team negligence.

title: FDA recalls knee replacement implant due to metal-on-metal corrosion
snippet: The FDA has issued a Class II recall for a popular knee replacement system after reports of metal debris causing tissue damage and premature implant failure.

title: CMS investigation targets hospital readmission billing practices
snippet: CMS has launched an investigation into billing practices at several hospital chains suspected of readmitting patients unnecessarily to increase Medicare reimbursement.

title: Consumer complaints: post-surgical infections at ambulatory surgery centers
snippet: ConsumerAffairs reports a 200% increase in complaints about surgical site infections at outpatient surgery centers, with knee and hip procedures most affected.

title: HIPAA breach notification — 340,000 patient records exposed
snippet: A major healthcare system reported a HIPAA breach exposing 340,000 patient records including surgical histories, diagnoses, and insurance information.

title: Reddit r/medicalmalpractice: experiences with knee surgery complications
snippet: Thread with 400+ comments from patients reporting complications after knee replacement including infection, nerve damage, and implant loosening. Several mention pursuing legal action.

title: BBB complaints surge for elective surgery centers over informed consent
snippet: The BBB has received 180 complaints in Q1 2026 from patients alleging inadequate informed consent before elective orthopedic procedures.
